text.disable_entity.title: Disable Entity
text.disable_entity.tooltip.global_enabl: Master switch for every selected feature. Turning it off keeps your detailed choices saved for later.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.disable_enti: Skips shadow drawing in the entity render dispatcher.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.entity_rende: Cancels entity rendering before entity-specific render work runs.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.hide_passive: Stops passive and ambient mobs from rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.hide_project: Stops projectiles and similar moving entities from rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.hide_display: Stops block, item, and text display entities from rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.hide_vehicle: Stops boats, minecarts, and similar vehicle entities from rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.never_hide_n: Preserves entities that have been given a custom name with a name tag.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.never_hide_t: Preserves tamed pets such as wolves, cats, and parrots.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.nametags_ena: Cancels label rendering for selected entity types.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.particles_en: Blocks particle spawning and optionally cancels particle rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.particle_mod: All hides every particle. Whitelist hides only enabled categories. Blacklist hides enabled categories.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.particle_blo: Controls block-breaking and block effect particles.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.particle_wat: Controls water, bubble, drip, and splash particles.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.particle_oth: Controls particles that do not fit another category.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.block_entiti: Cancels expensive block entity rendering before a renderer is queried.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.hide_chests: Hides chests and related chest variants.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.hide_furnace: Hides furnace, blast furnace, and smoker rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.hide_misc_bl: Hides block entities that do not match a dedicated toggle.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.block_states: Freezes blocks that change appearance often, stopping constant model rebuilding.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_redst: Freezes redstone dust, torches, and lamps to an unpowered visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_pisto: Freezes pistons to a retracted visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_doors: Freezes doors, trapdoors, and fence gates to a closed visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_rails: Freezes powered and activator rails to an unpowered visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_sculk: Freezes sculk sensors to an inactive visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_craft: Freezes crafters to an inactive visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_obser: Freezes observers to an unpowered visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_repea: Freezes repeaters and comparators to an unpowered visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_bells: Freezes bells to a stationary visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.freeze_other: Freezes any other identified dynamic block to its default visual state.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.world_render: Disables expensive or distracting world render effects.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.disable_clou: Prevents the cloud layer from rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.disable_weat: Prevents rain and snow from rendering.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.disable_vign: Removes the dark vignette around the edges of the screen.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.disable_hand: Stops the camera and hand from bobbing while walking.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.disable_over: Removes pumpkin, freezing, and portal overlays.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.adaptive_tun: Monitors FPS and prompts you to switch to a higher optimization preset when frame rate stays below the target.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.adaptive_tar: If average FPS falls below this value for the configured delay, an adaptive prompt will be shown.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.adaptive_del: How many seconds FPS must stay below target before the adaptive prompt appears.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.show_fps_del: After toggling a feature, shows a temporary message estimating the FPS change 2 seconds later.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.show_perform: Shows a small HUD overlay with the number of hidden entities, particles, and other render elements per frame.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.distance_cul: Applies a lightweight render-distance limit before rendering work begins.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.entity_dista: Uses the entity render-distance slider as an extra early-out.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.entity_rende: Maximum entity render distance in blocks.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.block_entity: Uses the block entity render-distance slider as an extra early-out.
Maximum block entity render distance in blocks.
text.disable_entity.tooltip.preset: Applies a recommended bundle of settings. Manual changes will switch the preset back to Custom.
text.disable_entity.overview.description: Use the master switch to pause or resume every selected optimization without losing the choices you made below.
text.disable_entity.section.entities.des: Controls entity models before the expensive render work begins.
text.disable_entity.section.nametags.des: Removes labels from the entity types you do not want to see.
text.disable_entity.section.particles.de: Filters new particles and can cull already-visible ones on the next tick.
text.disable_entity.section.block_entiti: Skips costly block entity renderers before they are queried.
text.disable_entity.section.block_states: Freezes the visual appearance of dynamic blocks. The actual server-side block state still functions normally.
text.disable_entity.section.world_render: Disables expensive environmental and camera effects.
text.disable_entity.section.distance_cul: Uses early distance limits to skip far-away rendering work.
text.disable_entity.section.hotkeys.desc: Bind fast runtime toggles in Controls. They apply immediately in game.
text.disable_entity.section.server_profi: Automatically switch settings when joining known multiplayer servers.
text.disable_entity.section.compatibilit: Informational status only. The mod stays on conservative dispatcher-level hooks and steps aside from overlapping culling mods.
text.disable_entity.hotkeys.description: Default keys are Insert, Home, End, Page Up, Page Down, Delete, Print Screen, and Scroll Lock. Rebind them in Controls; runtime toggles show an overlay message immediately.
text.disable_entity.compat.sodium.presen: Sodium detected: using dispatcher-level render cancellation only.
text.disable_entity.compat.iris.present: Iris detected: no framebuffer or shader pipeline hooks are used.
text.disable_entity.compat.entity_cullin: EntityCulling detected: this mod avoids custom occlusion logic.
text.disable_entity.compat.lithium.prese: Lithium detected: client rendering changes remain isolated.
MoreCulling detected: the mod stays on vanilla dispatcher hooks.
text.disable_entity.compat.immediately_f: ImmediatelyFast detected: no framebuffer or buffer-system hooks are used.
text.disable_entity.compat.enhanced_bloc: Enhanced Block Entities detected: block entity filtering remains dispatcher-level.
text.disable_entity.compat.dynamic_fps.p: Dynamic FPS detected: the mod does not alter focus or tick-rate behavior.
text.disable_entity.compat.indium.presen: Indium detected: block-state freezing uses dispatcher-level hooks to remain compatible.
text.disable_entity.compat.continuity.pr: Continuity detected: connected textures continue to work on frozen block states.
message.disable_entity.block_entities_en: Disable Entity: block entity hiding enabled
message.disable_entity.block_entities_di: Disable Entity: block entity hiding disabled
message.disable_entity.block_states_enab: Disable Entity: block state freezing enabled
message.disable_entity.block_states_disa: Disable Entity: block state freezing disabled
message.disable_entity.config_reset: Disable Entity: configuration reset to defaults
message.disable_entity.config_copied: Disable Entity: configuration copied to clipboard
message.disable_entity.config_imported: Disable Entity: configuration imported from clipboard
message.disable_entity.adaptive_prompt: Low FPS detected. Press Toggle All to switch to %s preset.
message.disable_entity.adaptive_applied: Disable Entity: switched to higher optimization preset
message.disable_entity.config_corrupted: Disable Entity: config was reset due to corruption (backup saved)
message.disable_entity.config_import_fai: Disable Entity: clipboard did not contain a valid configuration
text.disable_entity.server_profiles.no_s: Join a multiplayer server to configure per-server settings.
text.disable_entity.option.use_server_pr: Use custom settings for this server
text.disable_entity.tooltip.use_server_p: Saves the current configuration as a profile for this server. The profile will be loaded automatically every time you join.
